# Ember Gate

## Theme

The burning entrance to the Hellgate.

Fire and demonic creatures constantly emerge from the corrupted fortress.

## Biome Gameplay

Ember Gate teaches:

- constant movement
- avoiding burning ground
- dealing with aggressive enemies
- surviving burst damage

Unlike previous biomes, almost every enemy applies Burn.

Rule:
Every enemy is aggressive and constantly pressures the player.

---

# Fire Imp

## Role

Fast Skirmisher

## Difficulty

Easy

## Description

Small demonic creature.

Weak individually but extremely annoying in groups.

## AI

- Constantly chases the player.
- Never stands still.
- Attempts to surround the player.

## Basic Attack

Fire Claw

Quick melee swipe.

## Ability

Fireball Toss

Throws a small fireball.

Effects

- low damage
- applies Burn

Cooldown

6 seconds.

## Required Animations

- Idle
- Walk
- Run
- Attack
- Cast
- Death

## Optional Animations

- Hit

## VFX

- fireball
- flame trail
- embers

## SFX

- imp laugh
- fireball
- claws

---

# Ash Hound

## Role

Fast Predator

## Difficulty

Medium

## Description

Demonic hunting beast.

Extremely aggressive.

## AI

- Hunts the player relentlessly.
- Uses Charge whenever possible.

## Basic Attack

Bite

## Ability

Flame Charge

Rushes forward at high speed.

Effects

- high damage
- Burn

Missing leaves the Hound vulnerable for 1 second.

Cooldown

7 seconds.

## Required Animations

- Idle
- Walk
- Run
- Bite
- Charge
- Death

## Optional Animations

- Hit

## VFX

- fire trail
- burning footprints

## SFX

- growl
- charge
- bite

---

# Magma Broodling

## Role

Living Hazard

## Difficulty

Medium

## Description

A floating fragment of living magma.

Unstable and volatile.

## AI

- Slowly follows the player.
- Keeps medium distance.
- Self-destructs when close.

## Basic Attack

None

## Ability

Volatile Explosion

Explodes after a short delay.

Effects

- high fire damage
- leaves burning ground

Cooldown

One-time.

## Required Animations

- Idle
- Float
- Charge Up
- Explosion

## Optional Animations

None

## VFX

- magma glow
- lava fragments
- explosion
- burning ground

## SFX

- magma crackling
- explosion

---

# Hellgate Cerberus

## Role

Biome Boss

## Difficulty

Boss

## Description

Ancient guardian of the Hellgate.

Relentless predator.

## AI

- Constantly pressures the player.
- Never retreats.
- Alternates between melee and fire attacks.

## Basic Attack

Triple Bite Combo

Three consecutive bites.

## Ability 1

Hellfire Breath

Breathes fire in a cone.

Creates burning ground.

## Ability 2

Infernal Leap

Jumps toward the player.

Creates a fiery shockwave.

## Ability 3

Hellgate Roar

Lets out a terrifying roar.

Effects

- summons 2 Fire Imps
- briefly increases movement speed

## Phase 2

Triggered at 50% HP.

Changes

- Hellfire Breath becomes longer.
- Leap cooldown reduced.

## Phase 3

Triggered at 25% HP.

Cerberus enters Infernal Rage.

Effects

- attacks much faster
- all attacks apply stronger Burn
- leaves fire trails while moving

## Required Animations

- Idle
- Walk
- Run
- Bite
- Breath
- Leap
- Roar
- Death

## Optional Animations

- Hit

## VFX

- fire breath
- fire trail
- lava cracks
- burning ground
- infernal aura

## SFX

- heavy growl
- fire breath
- roar
- explosion
- footsteps
